reason: Remediation involves reviewing and potentially deleting local user accounts. Deleting an account without proper verification could remove a legitimate administrative or SSH-access account, leading to loss of remote access or service disruption. Because of this clear risk, human validation is required before any automated removal.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Accidental deletion of legitimate admin or service accounts; Potential loss of SSH or console access; Impact on applications relying on specific local users
